title: Potions backport
description: bring the new potions from 1.21 to 1.20.1
body:
Dive into an exhilarating new world This mod adds 3 potions to your adventure. 

Weaving Potion: a spider will spawn after your death.

Oozing Potion: a slime will spawn after your death.

Infestation Potion: Beware! This potion gives you a 10% chance that upon taking damage, a silverfish will spawn.
